decisions.rationale: title_substring noise. Different creators (Agostini lithograph vs Villares oil), different objects. Council: corpus needs both for fundacional sequence. Santa: promote as new.
title_substring noise. Different creators (Lopes Rodrigues 1896 vs Villares 1888), state commission vs positivist iconography. Council: distinct epistemic value. Santa: promote as new.
Same object: Ceschiatti sculpture at STF Brasilia. LPAI title omits attribution. Council: merge LPAI evidence into BR-009, do not duplicate. Santa: enrich existing record.
Same object, different state (etat avec remarque). Council: in printmaking, states are variants of same matrix; atlas does not need separate panel. Santa: enrich FR-008 with state note.
Same object family. LPAI adds "serie de 4 fotografias" — photographic documentation of same bust. Council: photographic series enriches but does not separate. Santa: enrich FR-009.
Same object. Existing FR-038 lacks URL; LPAI supplies Gallica URL and Janinet attribution. Council: URL and complete attribution are valuable enrichment. Santa: enrich FR-038.
